title: Crispy Chicken Quesadillas
description: These crispy chicken quesadillas are a family-friendly meal that's quick to prepare and a guaranteed hit with kids. Perfect for a weeknight dinner, they come together easily with minimal cleanup.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the shredded cooked chicken with taco seasoning. Mix well to coat.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Place one tortilla in the skillet. Sprinkle half a cup of mixed cheeses over one half of the tortilla.
Spoon about 1/4 cup of the seasoned chicken mixture over the cheese.
Fold the other half of the tortilla over the filling, pressing down gently.
Cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until the tortilla is golden brown and crispy, and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from skillet, cut into wedges, and repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
Serve immediately with salsa and sour cream for dipping.
tips: For extra crispiness, lightly butter the outside of the tortillas before placing them in the skillet.
You can easily customize the filling with finely diced bell peppers or corn for added veggies.
Pre-shredded rotisserie chicken makes this recipe even faster to prepare.
